steps: Submit formal tax reclaim to Citigroup Australia for AUD 138,750 citing AU-NO treaty rate of 15% vs applied 25%
Provide Norwegian tax residency certificate and treaty eligibility documentation to support 15% rate claim
Reference BHP Group Ltd (AU000000BHP4) dividend payment where 25% was withheld instead of treaty rate
Escalate to Citigroup's tax reclaim department if initial submission is delayed beyond 30 days

references.title: AU Treasury – Income Tax Treaties Table
ATO – Withholding from Dividends Paid to Foreign Residents
